title: Harness Picker UI — add dashboard controls for harness selection

items.title: Create reusable HarnessPicker component with ToS gating
items.description: New file src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/HarnessPicker.tsx. Props: value (Harness), onChange (Harness=>void), model (string), authMode (AuthMode), disabled?, size? ('sm'|'md'). Renders claude-code and pi options. Calls canUseHarness() for each; blocked option disabled with tooltip. Auto-reverts to claude-code when blocked. Exports HarnessPickerInline variant for Settings rows.
acceptanceCriteria: HarnessPicker renders both claude-code and pi options
Pi option disabled when canUseHarness(pi, model, authMode) returns false
Disabled option shows tooltip explaining restriction
Auto-reverts to claude-code via onChange when current selection becomes blocked
HarnessPickerInline variant exported for Settings rows

items.title: Extend spawn API endpoints to accept harness parameter
items.description: POST /api/agents: add optional harness: Harness, default claude-code, thread to launcher, persist to agent state, canUseHarness() validation 400 if blocked. POST /api/issues/:id/start-planning: add optional harness: Harness, default claude-code, thread to spawn-planning-session. Backward compatible.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/agents accepts optional harness param and passes to launcher
Invalid combination returns HTTP 400 with descriptive error
Requests without harness default to claude-code

items.title: Add harness picker to PlanDialog (planning kickoff)
items.description: In PlanDialog.tsx add harnessOverride state (default claude-code) alongside modelOverride. Render HarnessPicker below model dropdown. Pass harnessOverride in startPlanningViaSSE() request body.
acceptanceCriteria: PlanDialog shows HarnessPicker below model dropdown
Selected harness included in start-planning API request

items.title: Add harness picker to start-agent dashboard flow
items.description: In PlanDialog.tsx Start Agent tab add harnessOverride state and render HarnessPicker next to model picker. Pass harness in startAgentMutation.mutate() payload.

items.title: Add per-conversation harness override to ConversationPanel
items.description: In ConversationPanel.tsx add HarnessPicker to panel header/settings area. Selection is per-conversation local React state.
acceptanceCriteria: Selection is local to that conversation panel instance

items.title: Add per-role harness defaults to SettingsPage
items.description: In Settings/SettingsPage.tsx add HarnessPickerInline next to each specialist role's model dropdown. Persist to settings.specialists.<role>.harness. Verify cloister/router.ts getSpecialistHarness() reads from this key.
acceptanceCriteria: Each specialist row in Settings shows HarnessPickerInline
